title: About cgroup v2 — Deprecation of cgroup v1
text:
Kubernetes has deprecated cgroup v1.
Removal will follow
Kubernetes deprecation policy
.
Kubelet will no longer start on a cgroup v1 node by default.
To disable this setting a cluster admin should set
failCgroupV1
to false in the
kubelet configuration file
.

Learn more about
cgroups
Learn more about
container runtime
Learn more about
cgroup drivers
